document_title: Schedule of Base Unit Market Values for Residential, Commercial and Industrial Lands — Bontoc

_meta.source: Office of the Provincial Assessor — Bontoc GR Form 1 (edited)
_meta.act: RA 12001 (Real Property Valuation and Assessment Reform Act), Section 15
notes: Source doc shows 2012 + 2024 columns; the 2024 figures are treated as the operative 2027 values per the LGU's General Revision.
Official schedule: 2 commercial (C-1, C-2) + 10 residential (R-1..R-10). R-11..R-15 dropped from earlier draft.
Existing zones tagged R-11..R-15 need retagging; the rest of the ladder (C-1/C-2/R-1..R-10) shares values with the prior draft except C-1/R-1 (was ₱8,910, now ₱9,860).

items.location_description: Commercial lots along National Road within Poblacion — both sides from Circle to Kalangeg building; Circle to start of National Bridge fronting MPGCHS; Circle to Municipal Capitol; EDNP building to Barracks; Pearl Café to Barracks; Gomez residence to National Road Junction at Municipal Capitol. Also along Municipal Road from Wanchakan building to Pines Kitchenette down to Circle, and from JBA building to Pooten building.

Commercial lots along National Road of Bontoc Ili to Gonogon (Joel Tad-awan building to Palinga-aw, Gonogon, both sides) and along Lanao Road; National Road of Caluttit (Centrum building in front of DPWH to Pingew Restaurant, both sides); National Road of Samoki (end of National Bridge to Sukit / Anayas's Restaurant, both sides); National Road from Barracks to Cadre Road. Also along Municipal Roads: Akfab, Fakeg, Kayyab, Sengang, Layad, Ayyoweng, and Tugwi Streets.

Residential lots along National Roads from Circle to Malichom Samoki (Romel Lengwa Residence); Circle to Pakkil Caluttit (Morareng Residence); Circle to Balikian Bridge (Bontoc–Baguio Road); EDNP building to Barracks; Pearl Café to Barracks. Also along Caluttit–Plaza Road, Eyeb–Lanao Road, and Municipal Road from Wanchakan building to Pines Kitchenette down to Circle, and from JBA building to Pooten building.

Residential lots along National Road from end of Balikian Bridge to Amlosong; along National Road of Caluttit (Fagyan Residence to Pingew Restaurant); along National Road of Samoki starting from Malichom. Also along Municipal Roads: Akfab, Fakeg, Kayyab, Sengang, Layad, Ayyoweng, Tugwi — including inner lots of Poblacion.
Residential lots along Provincial Road (Bontoc–Maligcong Road) and along Bontoc–Mainit Road.
Inner lots of Caluttit, Bontoc Ili, and Samoki; residential lots along Provincial Roads of Maligcong, Guina-ang, Mainit, Talubin, Can-eo, Balili, and along Balikian–Dalican Road.
Along National Roads of Tocucan, Talubin, Bayyo, Alab Proper, Alab Oriente, and Gonogon.
Inner lots along Provincial Roads of Tocucan, Talubin, Bayyo, Alab Proper, Alab Oriente, Gonogon, Maligcong, Guina-ang, Mainit, Can-eo, and Balili.
Residential lots along Barangay Roads of Balili, Maligcong, Guina-ang, Mainit, and Talubin.
Inner lots along Barangay Roads of Balili, Maligcong, Guina-ang, and Talubin.
Inner lots of Dalican and Can-eo; mountainous and far-flung sitios of Maligcong, Guina-ang, and Can-eo (Chapyosen).
